title: FreeLook
description: The Original FreeLook Mod! Allowing you to rotate your view without affecting your movement.
body:
The **Original** FreeLook Mod, regretfully I did not adopt Modrinth fast enough to get the correct project ID :D This mod allows you to rotate your view without changing your movement! Much like you can in many FPS games, you can hold the keybind (Left Alt by default) and look around while staying whichever direction you are moving. The view will return when you let go of the key. You can configure this to return slowly (interpolate) or instantly. 

Client Side only!! So you can use it while you play on servers!

Feel free to use this in your modpacks!


Versions: Here on Modrinth, I will be uploading only the latest as of now and plan to upload consecutive versions as they are released. You can find earlier versions via other distribution channels.


Some GREAT uses for FreeLook!

 - look around while flying with elytra, without changing acceleration

 - look to your left or right while still running forward
